textByHash.17f77d0107ac73f4ae71794a22ede9f60bdd1ea2: Look, we've told you not to do that. It makes everyone uncomfortable.
textByHash.1c354f1113715bbf719945a4146c6b2b466520a1: What are we going to do?
textByHash.1c5f4ccfa7ef6e874caceea94eed8fc35975d7eb: Help! Save me from the demon!
textByHash.43f2f51cbbb8f453f902b161e70c6b075744fcce: Yeah! I'm going to get myself a dragon longsword! And a million rune ores! And a small piece of coloured paper to put on my head!
textByHash.4fe150fdbb33cccca8f8ac0767cdde00aec837b9: I guess none of us are going to get rich now. Let's do what needs to be done!
textByHash.55df98dd938c37d4f90ecbca6f692b9cfff92b21: I don't want to be satisfied, I want to be rich!
textByHash.55fa44fe855f0068844762fb1202c9dbbacb467c: Those gems on the demon's throne look valuable. I just wish I had some way to remove them.
textByHash.6a9c693736b35e7782674c12fbf0be3be390dde1: Get to your place in the circle and lead the ritual! I'm so excited!
textByHash.a41fbe1c95dd47e2b34eacbf7d8675f56b6979b5: Right now I don't have anything. But soon, I will have everything!
textByHash.a93428837d07ebe6b6793f4a80aeb7201b749002: Agrith-Naar is going to make us all sooo rich!
textByHash.bf874d29cf0b2143d8afa76094cf77f1ab45261d: Denath says he ran away. I don't know why. Who would want to run away from what Agrith-Naar is going to do for us?
textByHash.c73c7ef43344d71dd4bb423d004b59486a1e1237: What are we going to do?!!!
textByHash.f603ffc741af6a3113471763eb5632c8f23f0061: So Agrith-Naar was never going to do anything for us. I suppose I'll have to make my fortune the hard way!
